default.title: Initialize frontend project structure
default.body: Create the basic directory structure for the frontend application including `src/components`, `src/pages`, and `src/assets`.

default.title: Set up global CSS/styling
default.body: Configure the global stylesheet and define primary visual variables (colors, typography) based on the design system.

info-required.title: Define UI Component Library
info-required.body: Decide and document which UI component library (if any) will be used for the frontend architecture.
